lines.gurmukhi: ਭਏ ਕਿਰਪਾਲ ਪੂਰਨ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਦਾਤੇ ਜੀਅ ਹੋਏ ਮਿਹਰਵਾਨ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: bhe kirapaal pooran prabh daate jeea hoe miharavaan | rahaau |
lines.english: God, the Great Giver, the Perfect One, has become merciful to me, and now, all are kind to me. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜਨ ਸਰਨਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: naanak jan saranaaee |
lines.english: Servant Nanak has entered His Sanctuary.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਪਨੇ ਗੁਰ ਊਪਰਿ ਕੁਰਬਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: apane gur aoopar kurabaan |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice to my Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਗਲੇ ਦੂਖ ਮਿਟਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: sagale dookh mittaaee |
lines.english: All suffering has been dispelled.

lines.translit: sukh bhunchahu mere bhaaee |2|28|92|
lines.english: So enjoy peace, O my Siblings of Destiny! ||2||28||92||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਪੂਰਨ ਪੈਜ ਰਖਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: jin pooran paij rakhaaee |
lines.english: He has perfectly preserved his honor.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਨਹੁ ਬਿਨੰਤੀ ਠਾਕੁਰ ਮੇਰੇ ਜੀਅ ਜੰਤ ਤੇਰੇ ਧਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: sunahu binantee tthaakur mere jeea jant tere dhaare |
lines.english: Hear my prayer, O my Lord and Master; all beings and creatures were created by You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਰਠਿ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: soratth mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Sorat'h, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਖੁ ਪੈਜ ਨਾਮ ਅਪੁਨੇ ਕੀ ਕਰਨ ਕਰਾਵਨਹਾਰੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: raakh paij naam apune kee karan karaavanahaare |1|
lines.english: You preserve the honor of Your Name, O Lord, Cause of causes. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੁਰੇ ਭਲੇ ਹਮ ਥਾਰੇ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: bure bhale ham thaare | rahaau |
lines.english: Whether good or bad, I am Yours. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਣੀ ਪੁਕਾਰ ਸਮਰਥ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਬੰਧਨ ਕਾਟਿ ਸਵਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: sunee pukaar samarath suaamee bandhan kaatt savaare |
lines.english: The Almighty Lord and Master heard my prayer; cutting away my bonds, He has adorned me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਜੀਉ ਖਸਮਾਨਾ ਕਰਿ ਪਿਆਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: prabh jeeo khasamaanaa kar piaare |
lines.english: O Dear God, Beloved, please, make me Your own.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਹਿਰਿ ਸਿਰਪਾਉ ਸੇਵਕ ਜਨ ਮੇਲੇ ਨਾਨਕ ਪ੍ਰਗਟ ਪਹਾਰੇ ॥੨॥੨੯॥੯੩॥
lines.translit: pahir sirapaau sevak jan mele naanak pragatt pahaare |2|29|93|
lines.english: He dressed me in robes of honor, and blended His servant with Himself; Nanak is revealed in glory throughout the world. ||2||29||93||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਗੀਕਾਰੁ ਕੀਓ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਅਪੁਨੇ ਭਵ ਨਿਧਿ ਪਾਰਿ ਉਤਾਰੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: angeekaar keeo prabh apune bhav nidh paar utaare |1|
lines.english: Their God made them His own, and carried them across the terrifying world-ocean. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਰਠਿ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: soratth mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Sorat'h, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਅ ਜੰਤ ਸਭਿ ਵਸਿ ਕਰਿ ਦੀਨੇ ਸੇਵਕ ਸਭਿ ਦਰਬਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: jeea jant sabh vas kar deene sevak sabh darabaare |
lines.english: All beings and creatures are subservient to all those who serve in the Lord's Court.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤਨ ਕੇ ਕਾਰਜ ਸਗਲ ਸਵਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: santan ke kaaraj sagal savaare |
lines.english: He resolves all the affairs of His Saints.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੀਨ ਦਇਆਲ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾਲ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਨਿਧਿ ਪੂਰਨ ਖਸਮ ਹਮਾਰੇ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: deen deaal kripaal kripaa nidh pooran khasam hamaare | rahaau |
lines.english: He is merciful to the meek, kind and compassionate, the ocean of kindness, my Perfect Lord and Master. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਉ ਬੈਠੁ ਆਦਰੁ ਸਭ ਥਾਈ ਊਨ ਨ ਕਤਹੂੰ ਬਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: aau baitth aadar sabh thaaee aoon na katahoon baataa |
lines.english: I am asked to come and be seated, everywhere I go, and I lack nothing.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤਿ ਸਿਰਪਾਉ ਦੀਓ ਜਨ ਅਪੁਨੇ ਪ੍ਰਤਾਪੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਜਾਤਾ ॥੨॥੩੦॥੯੪॥
lines.translit: bhagat sirapaau deeo jan apune prataap naanak prabh jaataa |2|30|94|
lines.english: The Lord blesses His humble devotee with robes of honor; O Nanak, the Glory of God is manifest. ||2||30||94||

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਰਠਿ ਮਹਲਾ ੯ ॥
lines.translit: soratth mahalaa 9 |
lines.english: Sorat'h, Ninth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੇ ਮਨ ਰਾਮ ਸਿਉ ਕਰਿ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: re man raam siau kar preet |
lines.english: O mind, love the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਸਾਧਸੰਗਤਿ ਸਿਮਰੁ ਮਾਧੋ ਹੋਹਿ ਪਤਿਤ ਪੁਨੀਤ ॥
lines.translit: kar saadhasangat simar maadho hohi patit puneet |
lines.english: Join the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, and meditate in remembrance on the Lord; even a sinner like yourself will become pure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸ੍ਰਵਨ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਗੁਨੁ ਸੁਨਉ ਅਰੁ ਗਾਉ ਰਸਨਾ ਗੀਤਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sravan gobind gun sunau ar gaau rasanaa geet |1| rahaau |
lines.english: With your ears, hear the Glorious Praises of the Lord of the Universe, and with your tongue, sing His song. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਲੁ ਬਿਆਲੁ ਜਿਉ ਪਰਿਓ ਡੋਲੈ ਮੁਖੁ ਪਸਾਰੇ ਮੀਤ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: kaal biaal jiau pario ddolai mukh pasaare meet |1|
lines.english: Death is on the prowl, with its mouth wide open, friend. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਜੁ ਕਾਲਿ ਫੁਨਿ ਤੋਹਿ ਗ੍ਰਸਿ ਹੈ ਸਮਝਿ ਰਾਖਉ ਚੀਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: aaj kaal fun tohi gras hai samajh raakhau cheet |
lines.english: Today or tomorrow, eventually it will seize you; understand this in your consciousness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੈ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਰਾਮੁ ਭਜਿ ਲੈ ਜਾਤੁ ਅਉਸਰੁ ਬੀਤ ॥੨॥੧॥
lines.translit: kahai naanak raam bhaj lai jaat aausar beet |2|1|
lines.english: Says Nanak, meditate, and vibrate upon the Lord; this opportunity is slipping away! ||2||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਕੀ ਮਨ ਹੀ ਮਾਹਿ ਰਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: man kee man hee maeh rahee |
lines.english: The mind remains in the mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਰਠਿ ਮਹਲਾ ੯ ॥
lines.translit: soratth mahalaa 9 |
lines.english: Sorat'h, Ninth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਹਰਿ ਭਜੇ ਨ ਤੀਰਥ ਸੇਵੇ ਚੋਟੀ ਕਾਲਿ ਗਹੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: naa har bhaje na teerath seve chottee kaal gahee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: He does not meditate on the Lord, nor does he perform service at sacred shrines, and so death seizes him by the hair. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਾਰਾ ਮੀਤ ਪੂਤ ਰਥ ਸੰਪਤਿ ਧਨ ਪੂਰਨ ਸਭ ਮਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: daaraa meet poot rath sanpat dhan pooran sabh mahee |
lines.english: Wife, friends, children, carriages, property, total wealth, the entire world

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਵਰ ਸਗਲ ਮਿਥਿਆ ਏ ਜਾਨਉ ਭਜਨੁ ਰਾਮੁ ਕੋ ਸਹੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: avar sagal mithiaa e jaanau bhajan raam ko sahee |1|
lines.english: - know that all of these things are false. The Lord's meditation alone is true. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਫਿਰਤ ਫਿਰਤ ਬਹੁਤੇ ਜੁਗ ਹਾਰਿਓ ਮਾਨਸ ਦੇਹ ਲਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: firat firat bahute jug haario maanas deh lahee |
lines.english: Wandering, wandering around for so many ages, he has grown weary, and finally, he obtained this human body.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਕਹਤ ਮਿਲਨ ਕੀ ਬਰੀਆ ਸਿਮਰਤ ਕਹਾ ਨਹੀ ॥੨॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak kehat milan kee bareea simarat kahaa nahee |2|2|
lines.english: Says Nanak, this is the opportunity to meet the Lord; why don't you remember Him in meditation? ||2||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਰੇ ਕਉਨੁ ਕੁਮਤਿ ਤੈ ਲੀਨੀ ॥
lines.translit: man re kaun kumat tai leenee |
lines.english: O mind, what evil-mindedness have you developed?

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਰਠਿ ਮਹਲਾ ੯ ॥
lines.translit: soratth mahalaa 9 |
lines.english: Sorat'h, Ninth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਰ ਦਾਰਾ ਨਿੰਦਿਆ ਰਸ ਰਚਿਓ ਰਾਮ ਭਗਤਿ ਨਹਿ ਕੀਨੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: par daaraa nindiaa ras rachio raam bhagat neh keenee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: You are engrossed in the pleasures of other men's wives, and slander; you have not worshipped the Lord at all. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁਕਤਿ ਪੰਥੁ ਜਾਨਿਓ ਤੈ ਨਾਹਨਿ ਧਨ ਜੋਰਨ ਕਉ ਧਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: mukat panth jaanio tai naahan dhan joran kau dhaaeaa |
lines.english: You do not know the way to liberation, but you run all around chasing wealth.
